title: Helping 4 Educational Business Owners Build a $1M Business in 25 Minutes
creator: alexhormozi
rationale: Multi-stranger case-study + NICHE-FILTER (educational businesses only). Tests whether niche-filtered case studies prepend a niche-banner / scope-chip to the chassis. Companion to 0EqJD2o (6-business) at lower density (4-business in 25 min).
